title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Melaleuca alternifolia, also known as tea tree, essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural astringent and antibacterial properties. It helps to balance the scalp's natural pH, reducing the production of sebum and preventing clogged pores. The oil's ability to penetrate deep into the hair follicles and scalp also helps to break down excess oil and debris, leaving hair looking and feeling cleaner and healthier.
